items.title: Global chip sales hit $298.5B in Q1 2026, up 25% from Q4 2025, and March sales were up 79.2% YoY to $99.5B, driven by strong sales in Asia and the Americas (Semiconductor Industry Association)
items.title_original: Global chip sales hit $298.5B in Q1 2026, up 25% from Q4 2025, and March sales were up 79.2% YoY to $99.5B, driven by strong sales in Asia and the Americas (Semiconductor Industry Association)
items.title_en: Global chip sales hit $298.5B in Q1 2026, up 25% from Q4 2025, and March sales were up 79.2% YoY to $99.5B, driven by strong sales in Asia and the Americas (Semiconductor Industry Association)
items.title_zh: 2026 年第一季度全球芯片销售额达到 $298.5B，较 2025 年第四季度增长 25%，在亚洲和美洲强劲销售的推动下，3 月份销售额同比增长 79.2% 至 $99.5B（半导体行业协会）
items.title_bilingual: 2026 年第一季度全球芯片销售额达到 $298.5B，较 2025 年第四季度增长 25%，在亚洲和美洲强劲销售的推动下，3 月份销售额同比增长 79.2% 至 $99.5B（半导体行业协会） / Global chip sales hit $298.5B in Q1 2026, up 25% from Q4 2025, and March sales were up 79.2% YoY to $99.5B, driven by strong sales in Asia and the Americas (Semiconductor Industry Association)

items.title: Micron CEO warns 'AI is in very early innings' and it will 'need more memory' — another ominous sign the RAM crisis isn't going anywhere
items.title_original: Micron CEO warns 'AI is in very early innings' and it will 'need more memory' — another ominous sign the RAM crisis isn't going anywhere
